install_cmds: apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root update -q && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root install -y --no-install-recommends wget && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
pip install scipy clean-fid huggingface-hub safetensors requests filelock lpips

data_deps.name: diffusers_runtime_data
data_deps.description: CIFAR-10, clean-fid CIFAR stats/Inception weights, and VGG16 cache used by diffusion and VAE CV tasks.
